title: Pre-deployment
description: Transition team deployed on-site 1 week prior to Go-Live for thorough site assessment and planning.

title: HR & BGV
description: Background verification checks and joining formalities completed for all deployed personnel.

title: Training
description: Train-the-trainer program conducted with client and site-specific standards briefing for all staff.

title: Compliance
description: Statutory documentation and allied services readiness ensured before deployment begins.

title: Processes
description: SOPs, checklists, registers, and Statement of Work finalized and distributed to all team members.

title: Security
description: Security policy briefing and access protocol setup completed for the site and all personnel.

title: Reviews
description: Progress reviews conducted with client stakeholders to align on readiness and address concerns.

title: Go-Live
description: Formal handover to Operations team. Full service delivery commences as per agreed scope.

title: Stabilization
description: 30–45 day post Go-Live monitoring, performance review, and sign-off for complete stabilization.
